title: sida adscendens
intro: Sida adscendens, also known as the climbing sida or sida, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sida adscendens include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and its leaves and stems are commonly used to make teas, ointments, and salves.
